return(function(...)local end local function p(p)return h[p+(346606+-300698)]end do local p=string.len local E=math.floor local r=table.insert local k=h local m=table.concat local z=string.sub local return r(t)end,-703135-(-703135),function(h,p)local r=q(p)local k=function(...)return E(h,{...},p,r)end return k end,function(h,p)local r=q(p)local k=function(k,m)return E(h,{k,m},p,r)end return k end return(P(-998778+17075537,{}))(r(t))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[p(165731+-211549)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
